frames.title: Aerial — Court in the Loop
frames.caption: Top-down view of the terracotta half-court and parkour cluster tucked into the shaded figure-eight loop, screened from quiet rooms by ghaf planting with the wadi bioswale curling past below.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow top-down drone descent over a terracotta basketball half-court with a pale four-point star center mark, set in a lush desert park beside a winding shaded path and green bioswale, late golden-hour light, teens playing below, warm and energetic mood.

frames.title: Approach — Through the Green Screen
frames.caption: Arriving along the loop path between dense planting screens, the high terracotta-slat canopy and a glimpse of the court and hoop pull teens in from the walk.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic steadicam walking shot along a sandy park path between dense green hedges toward a high terracotta-slatted pergola sheltering a basketball court, teenagers ahead dribbling a ball, warm late-afternoon desert light, anticipatory upbeat mood.

frames.title: Courtside — Game in Progress
frames.caption: Courtside under the high slatted canopy: a jump shot arcs toward the hoop, a defender stretches, spectators fill the bleacher steps, and parkour blocks wait at the edge.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic low courtside tracking shot gliding past teenagers playing three-on-three basketball on a terracotta court under a tall slatted timber canopy, slat shadows raking the surface, friends cheering from concrete seat steps, golden-hour light, lively competitive mood.

frames.title: Flythrough — Oblique Drone
frames.caption: An oblique drone pass reveals the whole room at once: floating slatted canopy, sparkle center mark, parkour cluster, bleacher edge, and the loop and bioswale threading around it.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic cinematic drone orbit at oblique angle around a shaded basketball half-court and parkour blocks in a green desert park, a figure-eight path and vegetated swale weaving past, long shadows at golden hour, sweeping confident mood.

frames.title: Evolution — Opening Day
frames.caption: Day one: the canopy, court, bleachers and blocks are complete while staked ghaf saplings and shrub plugs mark out the future screen, and the first teens test the surface.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow push-in on a brand-new terracotta basketball court under a fresh timber slat canopy, young staked trees and tiny shrubs in raw sand beds behind, first teenagers shooting hoops, bright morning desert light, fresh optimistic mood.

frames.title: Evolution — Year Two
frames.caption: Two years on: the ghaf trees stand free of their stakes, the shrub screen knits toward hip height, and pickup games and parkour sessions have become routine.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow push-in on the same shaded basketball court two years on, adolescent trees casting light shade and a knee-high green hedge filling in behind, teenagers mid pickup game and one vaulting parkour blocks, warm afternoon light, settled thriving mood.

frames.title: Evolution — Year Five
frames.caption: Year five: broad ghaf canopies and a continuous shoulder-high screen wrap the court in green, tree shade mingles with the slats, and bleachers fill for full games.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow push-in on a mature shaded basketball court embraced by broad umbrella-like ghaf trees and a dense green screen, dappled canopy and slat shadows across worn terracotta, a full teen game with crowded seat steps, rich golden-hour light, flourishing communal mood.

frames.title: Night — Under the Court Lights
frames.caption: The same courtside view after dusk: warm fittings under the slats pool light on the terracotta, the sparkle center mark glows, and the evening game keeps its energy without spilling glare into the quiet rooms.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic nighttime courtside tracking shot of teenagers playing basketball under warm downlights hung from a slatted canopy, pools of light on terracotta with a softly glowing star center mark, deep blue-green dusk sky and dark planting beyond, energetic intimate evening mood.
